name: Stickman Maze Run
author: Poki
description: Stickman Maze Run is a platform game where your mission is simple—find the exit and escape the maze! Play solo to test your skills, team up with a friend in co-op mode, or go head-to-head in a thrilling two-player race. Run, jump, climb walls, and dodge tricky obstacles as you make your way through challenging mazes. Unlock fun skins to customize your stickman and show off your style. Ready to race your way out? How to play Stickman Maze Run Single player Move: WASD or the arrow keys Two player P1: the arrow keys P2: WASD Who created Stickman Maze Run Stickman Maze Run is created by Claudiu V. Play their other games on Poki: Kitty Loves Birds and Pets Park ! How can I play Stickman Maze Run for free? You can play Stickman Maze Run for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Maze Run on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Maze Run can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Stickman Maze Run with my friend? Yes! Stickman Maze Run is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
